ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-09-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-08-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HERITAGE BANK OF COMMERCE'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED BECAUSE NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECEIVE REIMBURSEMENT OF $2952.00 IN ADDITIONAL ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. THE CASE IS DISMISSED BECAUSE ALL OF THE DEFENDANTS HAVE BEEN DEFAULTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn For Order Of Discharge; Notice
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HERITAGE BANK OF COMMERCE'S Motion For Order Of Discharge and award of costs and attorneys' fees is granted because no opposition was filed. Plaintiff shall receive reimbursement of $2952.00 in additional attorney fees and costs. The case is dismissed because all of the defendants have been defaulted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas Lewis, Esq., from Robertson & Lewis, 408-294-3600, for plaintiff and moving party, appearing by telephone

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF HERITAGE BANK OF COMMERCE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Costs And Attorneys Fees is
Granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
